zh.Coxwell, Berkshire, England: 英國英格蘭波克夏可維爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Cordray III於大約1520年出生在英國維爾爾特時，他的父親Thomas Cordray II38歲，母親Joan Seymour46歲。他於大約1534年與Jane Morris在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1582年9月24日在英國維爾爾特享年63歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波克夏可維爾。

zh-hans.Coxwell, Berkshire, England: 英国英格兰波克夏可維爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Cordray III于大约1520年出生在英国維爾爾特时，他的父亲Thomas Cordray II38岁，母亲Joan Seymour46岁。他于大约1534年与Jane Morris在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1582年9月24日在英国維爾爾特享年63岁，埋葬在英国英格兰波克夏可維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Cordray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French coer de roi ‘(having the) heart of a king’. This surname is now extinct in Britain.

variants.name: Cordrey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Cordray . Alternatively, possibly derived from Old French corderie ‘ropery, rope-walk’, taken to mean a worker at a ropery.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Cordray III was born about 1520, in Chute, Wiltshire, England, his father, Thomas Cordray II, was 38 and his mother, Joan Seymour, was 46. He married Jane Morris about 1534, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 24 September 1582, in Chute, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 63, and was buried in Coxwell, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Cordray III est né environ 1520, à Chute, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Cordray II, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Joan Seymour, avait 46 ans. Il a épousé Jane Morris environ 1534, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 24 septembre 1582, à Chute, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Coxwell, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Cordray III um 1520 in Chute, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Cordray II 38 und seine Mutter Joan Seymour 46. Er hat um 1534 in England, United Kingdom Jane Morris geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 24. September 1582 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Chute, Wiltshire, England und wurde in Coxwell, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Cordray III è nato il circa 1520 nel Chute, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Cordray II, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Joan Seymour, aveva 46 anni. Lui sposato Jane Morris circa 1534, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 24 settembre 1582, nel Chute, Wiltshire, England, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Coxwell, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Chute, Wiltshire, England: イギリスウィルトシュアイアチウト
ja.Coxwell, Berkshire, England: イギリスイギリスバークシュアイアコクスウエル
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Cordray IIIが約1520年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアチウトで生まれた時，父Thomas Cordray IIは38歳，母Joan Seymourは46歳であった。約1534年にイギリスイギリスでJane Morrisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1582年9月24日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアチウトで63歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスバークシュアイアコクスウエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Cordray III(이)가 대략 1520년 영국 윌츠히르 c후트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Cordray II(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Seymour(은)는 46세였다. 그는 대략 1534년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Jane Morris(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1582년 9월 24일 영국 윌츠히르 c후트에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 콕스웰에 묻혔다.

mn.Coxwell, Berkshire, England: Coxwell, Bearrucscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Cordray III nasceu aproximadamente 1520, em Chute, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Cordray II, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Joan Seymour, tinha 46 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Morris aproximadamente 1534, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de setembro de 1582, em Chute, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Coxwell, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Cordray III родился около 1520 г. в местности чут, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Cordray II было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Seymour, 46. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Morris около 1534 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 24 сентября 1582 г. в местности чут, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности коксвелл, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Cordray III nació aproximadamente 1520, en Chute, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Cordray II, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Joan Seymour, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Jane Morris aproximadamente 1534, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 24 de septiembre de 1582, en Chute, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Coxwell, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
